turns.name: CHIEF JUSTICE REHNQUIST
turns.text: The opinions of the Court in two cases will be announced by Justice White.

turns.name: JUSTICE WHITE
turns.text: The first of these is Southwest Marine Incorporated against Gizoni. It is No. 90-584. For the reasons stated in an opinion on file with the Court, the judgment of the Court of Appeals for the Ninth Circuit is affirmed. Justice Thomas took no part in the consideration or decision of that case.
